section_name: Suspension or Denial on Order of Justice or Municipal Court for Contempt of Court; Reinstatement
text:
(a) The department shall suspend or deny the issuance of a driver’s license or learner license on receipt of an order to suspend or deny the issuance of either license from a justice or municipal court under Article 45A.461 (Failure to Pay Fine or Appear) , Code of Criminal Procedure.

(b) The department shall reinstate a license suspended or reconsider a license denied under Subsection (a) on receiving notice from the justice or municipal court that ordered the suspension or denial that the contemnor has fully complied with the court’s order.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.3451 — Suspension or Denial on Order of Justice or Municipal Court for Contempt of Court; Reinstatement

(a) The department shall suspend or deny the issuance of a driver’s license or learner license on receipt of an order to suspend or deny the issuance of either license from a justice or municipal court under Article 45A.461 (Failure to Pay Fine or Appear) , Code of Criminal Procedure.

(b) The department shall reinstate a license suspended or reconsider a license denied under Subsection (a) on receiving notice from the justice or municipal court that ordered the suspension or denial that the contemnor has fully complied with the court’s order.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 765 (H.B.4504), Sec. 2.169, eff. January 1, 2025.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall reinstate a license suspended or reconsider a license denied under Subsection (a) on receiving notice from the justice or municipal court that ordered the suspension or denial that the contemnor has fully complied with the court’s order.
